mapper.select: SELECT f.menu_id, m.menu_nm, m.pgm_id, m.url, m.icon, f.sort_order FROM tb_user_favorite f JOIN tb_menu m ON f.menu_id = m.menu_id WHERE f.user_id = #{user_id} ORDER BY f.sort_order, f.created_at
SELECT menu_id FROM tb_menu WHERE pgm_id = #{pgm_id} AND use_yn = 'Y' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_user_favorite (user_id, menu_id, sort_order, created_at) VALUES (#{user_id}, #{menu_id}, COALESCE((SELECT MAX(sort_order) + 1 FROM tb_user_favorite WHERE user_id = #{user_id}), 1), NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_user_favorite WHERE user_id = #{user_id} AND menu_id = #{menu_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_user_settings (user_id, setting_key, setting_value, updated_at) VALUES (#{user_id}, #{setting_key}, #{setting_value}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_user_settings WHERE user_id = #{user_id} AND setting_key = #{setting_key}
